bot_name.description: Display name for this bot instance

alert_chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID where alert notifications are sent

database.description: Path to the SQLite database file (relative to project root)

logs.description: Directory for log files (relative to project root)

features.description: Turn features on or off for this bot

settings.description: Optional tunable values — all have sensible defaults

alert_cooldown_hours.description: Hours before the same alert can fire again

check_interval_market_hours.description: Alert check frequency in seconds during market hours

check_interval_off_hours.description: Alert check frequency in seconds outside market hours
